channel.title: Linen Cotton on 深圳百陈服装有限公司 | Bettzen
channel.description: Recent content in Linen Cotton on 深圳百陈服装有限公司 | Bettzen

item.title: Wholesale Linen-Cotton Cardigan | Striped Open Front Oversized Knit
item.description: The perfect lightweight layer for warm weather. Knitted from a breathable linen-cotton blend yarn in a fresh stripe pattern, soft, airy and with good drape. The longline, open-front design with an oversized fit makes it an easy throw-on piece.

item.title: Wholesale Linen-Cotton Trousers | Vertical Stripe Wide Leg Pants
item.description: Embrace relaxed tailoring. These trousers feature a woven linen-cotton blend fabric in a vertical stripe pattern, offering excellent breathability, soft dense handfeel and good drape.
